title: Evaluate Deployment Topologies
description: Contrast blue/green, canary, and rolling update deployment strategies. Evaluate deployment topologies considering database schema compatibility requirements. Analyze the challenges of inter-service versioning during deployments across different topologies.
objectives: Contrast blue/green, canary, and rolling update deployment strategies.
Evaluate deployment topologies considering database schema compatibility requirements.
Analyze the challenges of inter-service versioning during deployments across different topologies.
